title: I Don't Hate Las Vegas Anymore
original_title: I Don't Hate Las Vegas Anymore
overview: A real-life comedy about a filmmaker who takes a road trip to Las Vegas -- with his real-life father and 16-year-old half-brother, plus a crew of three -- in the hopes of proving the existence of God.
